scenario: Building a residue-level interaction fingerprint database for toxin-receptor complexes using ProLIF.
task: Populating toxin-receptor complex entries with compound names, SMILES, PDB IDs, key binding residues, and toxic mechanisms for interaction fingerprint computation.
data_type: Toxin names, SMILES strings, PDB IDs, residue-level binding contacts (>=20 words), and toxic mechanism descriptions (>=20 words).
